<!--
Pixies PR template.
For the body-style rules, see the `pr` skill (.agents/skills/pr/SKILL.md).

Rules of thumb:
- Lead the Summary with the issue link: `Closes #N` or `Refs #N`.
- Capture what you DECIDED and what you REJECTED — not what the diff shows.
- Omit any section that adds nothing. Empty headings are noise.
- Don't paste code, file lists, commit lists, or "tests pass" — that's all in the GitHub UI.
-->

## Summary

<!--
A few sentences: what does this PR change, and why?
Link the issue: `Closes #N` (merging closes it) or `Refs #N` (related, not closing).
-->

## Decisions

<!--
The non-obvious choices a reviewer can't infer from the diff:
- Alternatives considered and rejected, with reasons.
- Invariants that had to be preserved, and how.
- Why the change is shaped the way it is.
Skip anything obvious or already settled in the linked issue.
-->

## Out of scope

<!--
What you deliberately did NOT do here, and why.
Link follow-up issues (`#N`) where relevant.
-->

## Review notes

<!--
Only if useful: back-compat risks, gotchas, or a suggested review order for large PRs.
Delete this whole section if there's nothing a reviewer wouldn't see from the diff.
-->
